message:
Refactor core infrastructure for modular architecture and extensibility

This commit restructures the core library architecture to support the
expanded feature set (dual-backend search, multi-connector indexing,
rich TUI) while maintaining clean module boundaries and enabling future
extensibility.

Library organization improvements (lib.rs):
- Explicit module declarations with visibility control:
  - pub mod config, connectors, indexer, search, storage, ui
  - pub(crate) for internal utilities and shared helpers
  - Re-exports of commonly used types at crate root for ergonomic imports
- Conditional compilation guards for platform-specific code
- Feature flags for optional dependencies (planned: web UI, API server)
- Prelude module for glob imports in internal modules

Domain model enhancements (model/types.rs):
- Core types extended with new fields for TUI and search:
  - Conversation: added approx_tokens field for token estimation,
    messages Vec for eager loading option (TUI detail view)
  - Message: added snippets Vec for code excerpt storage (search results),
    extra serde_json::Value for connector-specific metadata
  - Workspace: added display_name Option for user-friendly labels
- Trait implementations:
  - Clone for all types (enables value semantics in UI)
  - Debug with pretty-print formatting for development
  - PartialEq for testing and deduplication
  - Serialize/Deserialize for JSON export and API
- Builder pattern helpers for test fixture creation
- Type aliases for common combinations (ConversationWithMessages, etc.)

Indexer orchestration improvements (indexer/mod.rs):
- Parallel connector execution:
  - Rayon-based concurrent scanning of all six connectors
  - Work-stealing scheduler for load balancing
  - Configurable thread pool size via environment variable
- Progress reporting:
  - Per-connector progress bars via indicatif
  - Real-time throughput metrics (messages/sec, conversations/sec)
  - Estimated time remaining based on rolling average
- Incremental indexing logic:
  - Timestamp-based delta detection (since_ts parameter)
  - Source path deduplication to skip unchanged files
  - Batch size optimization (1000 messages per transaction)
- Error handling and recovery:
  - Per-connector failure isolation (one connector failure doesn't abort)
  - Detailed error logging with source path and line number
  - Partial success reporting (e.g., "4/6 connectors succeeded")
- Watch mode enhancements:
  - File system event debouncing (300ms window)
  - Connector-specific path filtering (only re-scan affected connector)
  - Graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM
  - Watch restart on configuration reload

Module integration:
- lib.rs exports unified API surface for CLI, TUI, and future web UI
- types.rs provides stable data model shared across all modules
- indexer orchestrates connectors and storage without coupling to either

Backward compatibility:
- Existing API unchanged (additive changes only)
- Default field values maintain prior behavior
- Feature flags allow incremental adoption

Testing infrastructure:
- Mock implementations of all traits for unit testing
- Fixture generators for realistic test data
- Property-based tests for invariant checking (planned)

This refactoring enables the full feature set delivered in this series of
commits: rich TUI, dual-backend search, six-connector coverage, incremental
indexing, and extensibility for future enhancements (web UI, API server,
export formats).
